items.title: Iran live updates: US says 3 F-15s shot down by friendly fire
items.description: The U.S. and Israel launched a joint attack on Iran on Saturday, officials said.

items.title: WATCH:  6-year-old son helps father coach hoops team
items.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to a 6-year-old boy who's becoming famous on social media by assisting his father in coaching a high school basketball team.

items.title: WATCH:  Urgent rescue after hot air balloon crash
items.description: ABC News' Hannah Battah reports on a sky-high rescue in Northeast Texas after a hot air balloon got caught in a communications tower.

items.title: Department of Homeland Security warns of potential attacks amid Iran operation
items.description: The Department of Homeland Security has warned of potential lone-wolf and cyberattacks amid the ongoing strikes in Iran, according to a law enforcemen...

items.title: LIVE:  ABC News Live
items.description: 24/7 coverage of breaking news and live events
